common.reports_desc_long: Latest market insights derived by Synapse AI. We provide a multi-faceted perspective integrating technical analysis, fundamentals, and on-chain data.
common.institutional_access_desc: Synapse AI monitors global markets 24/7, extracting only high-probability signals.
common.not_found_desc: The requested intelligence layer was not found. Please check if the URL is correct or if the report has been moved.

footer.tagline: A fusion of multi-faceted AI market analysis and next-generation financial intelligence. We continue to pursue 'evidence-based predictions' in uncertain markets.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: All financial predictions are AI-generated and do not constitute investment advice. Trading involves substantial risk.

sidebar.stats_desc: Verified track record from {total} public reports

landing.hero_title: Uncovering the truth of financial markets through deep AI analysis.
landing.hero_desc: Real-time multi-faceted market analysis powered by advanced proprietary algorithms. We integrate on-chain data, macroeconomic indicators, and institutional sentiment to provide highly transparent intelligence.
landing.feature_terminal_desc: Millisecond-level tick data updates and AI predictions. All the infrastructure professionals need, integrated into a single refined interface.
landing.feature_risk_desc: Not just high-probability AI entries, but a rock-solid foundation for growth with multi-layered stop-loss algorithms to minimize drawdowns.

signals.analysis_desc_buy: Solid support levels confirmed. High probability of mid-term rebound based on multi-dimensional correlation analysis of market volatility and price deviation.
signals.analysis_desc_sell: Heavy resistance observed at current levels. High probability of entering a correction phase based on multi-dimensional correlation analysis.

reports.realtime_price_desc: Market reference price based on real-time API.

exchange.protocol_desc: Synapse AI analysis algorithms constantly monitor the execution speed, spread stability, and transparency of each partner. We certify only those environments suitable for professional investing from an impartial third-party perspective.
exchange.start_trading_optimal: Start trading in the optimal environment.
exchange.declaration_text_1: We do not accept excessive advertising fees from any brokers that would distort our evaluations.
exchange.declaration_text_2: Partner selection is based on execution speed and spread tolerance simulated by our AI engine. Transparent evaluations without distortion.
exchange.target_desc: The AI analyzes the execution algorithms and infrastructure of each broker. This service performs best for the investment styles with the above characteristics.
exchange.advantage_desc: By integrating with Synapse Capital's AI signals, slippage at high-probability entry points is minimized, maximizing strategy reproducibility.
exchange.pros_desc: Industry-leading spreads and advanced execution algorithms maximize AI signal reproducibility. Supports everything from short-term trading to long-term holding.
exchange.cons_desc: While highly functional, response times may decrease during high loads or certain trading costs may apply. Please consider carefully based on your individual investment goals.

position_checker.hero_desc: Your investment plan (tickers, prices, risk settings) is multi-dimensionally verified by a group of institutional-level specialist AIs. Three personified AIs with advanced expertise in macro correlations, volatility prediction, and order book imbalances sharply critique and review your strategy from their unique perspectives.
position_checker.form_desc: Please freely enter the outline of the trade you want to verify (entry rationale, expected time horizon, risk tolerance, etc.).
position_checker.expert_01_desc: Major central bank policies, interest rate trends, and global asset correlation deep learning.
position_checker.expert_02_desc: Financial engineering-based volatility estimation and institutional risk management.
position_checker.expert_03_desc: Microstructures, order book imbalances, and sentiment bias execution model.
position_checker.disclaimer_text: This analysis is a simulation result and does not constitute investment advice. Trading involves risk.
position_checker.validation_buy_tp: For buy orders, take profit must be higher than entry price.
position_checker.validation_buy_sl: For buy orders, stop loss must be lower than entry price.
position_checker.validation_sell_tp: For sell orders, take profit must be lower than entry price.
position_checker.validation_sell_sl: For sell orders, stop loss must be higher than entry price.

track_record.hero_desc: Aiming for a world of AI investment without lies. We disclose the raw prediction performance in real time, including all unfavorable results.

pro.hero_desc: AI multi-factorially analyzes currency price actions, economic indicators, and market sentiment. Highlighting patterns global traders might miss, directly on your screen.
pro.usd_theme_desc: Expectations of US rate cuts receding. Stronger economic indicators lead to USD strength. Interest rate differentials are the primary driver.
pro.jpy_theme_desc: Seeking exit from negative interest rates. Focus on BoJ policy reversal timing. Key is the virtuous cycle of wages and prices.
pro.sentiment_desc: Real-time analysis of SNS, news, and options market skews using proprietary AI. Predicting market direction one step ahead of the crowd.
pro.vola_desc: Instantly detect volatility anomalies. Capture signs of trend reversals or sudden price shifts by measuring deviations from statistical means.
pro.corr_desc: Dynamic correlation between major pairs and macro assets (rates, commodities, indices). Determining if current theme is Rates or Risk-Off.
pro.diagnosis_high: Fewer inconsistencies, expecting price action following technical indicators.
pro.diagnosis_low: Noise detected in some indicators, caution for sudden volatility. AI detects attempts to break resistance.

crypto_pro.hero_title: AI thoroughly analyzes the crypto market.
crypto_pro.hero_desc: From BTC to SOL, covering everything from major tickers to emerging L1s. AI monitors whale movements and DEX volume to capture the waves of volatility.
crypto_pro.btc_vs_us10y_desc: BTC's hedge function in a rising rate environment is declining. Correlation as a risk asset is becoming clearer.
crypto_pro.whale_accumulation_desc: Inflow to major exchanges is decreasing. Whales' transfer to cold wallets is accelerating, suggesting supply shortage.
crypto_pro.liquidity_desc: Integrated analysis of CEX order books in milliseconds. Visualizing 'order book depth' that captures institutional moves and effective slippage during sudden moves.
crypto_pro.node_desc: Analysis of transaction density, average gas prices, and mempool across mainnet and L1/L2 layers. Measuring blockchain health and on-chain demand intensity.
crypto_pro.whale_desc: Extracting and tracking large on-chain transactions over $1M in real time. Monitoring exchange inflows (sell pressure) and outflows (return to long-term holding).
crypto_pro.onchain_high: Low noise, in a region where technical rebound can be expected.
crypto_pro.onchain_low: Overall market volatility is rising, caution for sudden slippage is needed.

stocks_pro.hero_desc: Integrating real-time PER, PBR, and short-term trading signals for S&P 500, Nikkei 225, and major European stocks. The same perspective as institutional investors, right at your fingertips.
stocks_pro.alpha_desc: Quantifying future excess returns (Alpha) from the perspective of profitability, growth, and supply-demand using a proprietary multi-factor model. AI scouts promising investment targets.
stocks_pro.flow_desc: AI monitors dark pool and block trade flows that don't appear in normal quotes. Visually depicting the accumulation (buying) and distribution (selling) of smart money.
stocks_pro.disp_desc: Dynamically measuring the divergence of individual stock price movements within each sector. Determining if the overall market is a 'Beta market' moving in the same direction, or an 'Alpha market' where stock selection is key.
stocks_pro.investment_verdict_text: {ticker} currently maintains an extremely high relative advantage in the {type} sector. AI algorithm judges the recent rise with volume as 'accumulation by large investors'. A breakout of the upper resistance line is likely in the short term, suggestively transitioning to a medium-to-long term growth phase.
